torch_pattern: sum1 = torch.sum(token_embeddings * input_mask_expanded, dim=1); sum2 = torch.sum(input_mask_expanded, dim=1).clamp(min=1e-9); result = sum1 / sum2  # masked mean pooling
applicability_notes: Masked mean-pooling: two sibling ttnn.sum reductions (weighted-embedding sum and mask-count sum) over the same dim=1 feeding a div — sentence-transformer pooling pattern repeated verbatim at 6+ call sites. The two sums are parallel branches sharing the mask tensor; merge candidate.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: token embeddings [B,S,H] and expanded mask, interleaved
placement_observations.source: model call site: pooling path creates mask_tt with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT before summed_tt = ttnn.sum(ttnn.multiply(tt_hidden, mask_tt), dim=2)
